title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **What it proves:** `test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh` verifies plan-doc section presence and runs key local contracts for auth gateway/reentry plus orchestration guard tests (e.g. [test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh#L15) and [#L28](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh#L28)). - **What it still cannot prove:** It does not validate real iPhone/PWA/prod behavior (service worker cache, `/happy/auth` routing, real auth/session roundtrip), and several called tests are hard-wired to another path (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator`), so this gate can pass while the worktree under test is not what actually ran (e.g. [test-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-gateway.js#L3)). - **One missing manual validation:** On a real iPhone installed PWA with an old cached shell, trigger `auth stale` and confirm end-to-end `Happy -> /happy/auth -> login -> returnTo original task screen` without 404 or context loss.
